_provenance: Closed by RFP-deliverable-5 dispatch on 2026-05-18. The Phase 7 Round 2 BLOCKER (AuthPayload Void trap on __check_auth) was resolved by Phase 8 Stream B's makeOzSmartAccountAuthEncoder (wallet-adapter/src/oz_smart_account_auth.ts), which: (a) clears op.auth[] to force record-mode re-simulation, (b) injects a properly encoded AuthPayload ScVal into the SA's auth entry, (c) emits matching nested Account-credentials auth entries for each Signer::Delegated G so __check_auth's require_auth_for_args call resolves, (d) appends the missing read/write footprint entries (ContextRuleData, account ledger entries, nested-G nonce entries) that the recording-mode simulator under-counts, and (e) bumps readBytes/writeBytes/instructions/resourceFee budgets accordingly. The MCP server's verify_install handler (crates/oz-policy-mcp/src/verify_chain.rs) now performs a real on-chain readback via simulateTransaction(SA.get_context_rule(rule_id)) and field-for-field diffs the decoded ContextRule against the supplied PolicySpec.
_invariants: APPEND-ONLY. The install_tx_hash + context_rule_id are immutable on-chain artifacts; do not rotate them. A future RFP-deliverable-5 re-validation should append a sibling install-result-vN.json next to this file rather than overwriting it.
